en.name: Spelling Bee
en.description: Spelling Bee is the buzz-worthy word puzzle from The New York Times that has word lovers hooked! Given seven letters arranged in a honeycomb pattern, create as many valid words as possible. Every word must include the center letter, and words must be at least 4 letters long. Find the pangram (a word using all 7 letters) to earn Queen Bee status! This daily puzzle combines vocabulary challenge with the satisfaction of discovery.
en.objectives: Find as many valid words as possible using the 7 honeycomb letters, always including the center letter. Discover the pangram (using all letters) for maximum points. Aim for 'Genius' or even 'Queen Bee' ranking by finding all possible words.
en.howToPlay: Make words of 4+ letters using the honeycomb letters. Every word must contain the center letter. Pangrams (using all 7 letters) earn bonus points!

rules.controls: Click or type letters to spell words. The center letter must be included in every word. Press Enter or click Submit to check your word.
mechanics: Words must be at least 4 letters long
Every word must include the center letter
Letters can be used multiple times within a word
Score ranks you from Beginner to Queen Bee
features: Daily Puzzle - Same puzzle for everyone
Progress Ranks - From Beginner to Queen Bee
Pangram Hunt - Find the word using all letters
Shuffle - Rearrange outer letters for new perspectives

tips: Look for plural forms of words
Find the pangram for big points

faq.question: What is a pangram?
faq.answer: A pangram is a word that uses all 7 available letters at least once. Finding the pangram gives you a big score boost and is often key to reaching higher ranks.

faq.question: Can I use letters more than once?
faq.answer: Yes! You can use any letter multiple times in a word. For example, if you have 'L', you can spell 'LEVEL'.

faq.question: How do I reach Queen Bee status?
faq.answer: Queen Bee requires finding all possible words in the puzzle. It's extremely difficult and often requires hours of play or collaborative effort.

faq.question: What's the shuffle button for?
faq.answer: Shuffling rearranges the 6 outer letters randomly. This can help you see new letter combinations and break out of word-finding ruts.

zh.name: 拼字蜜蜂
zh.description: 拼字蜜蜂是《纽约时报》风靡文字爱好者的单词谜题！给定七个以蜂窝模式排列的字母，创造尽可能多的有效单词。每个单词必须包含中心字母，单词长度至少4个字母。找到全字母词（使用所有7个字母的单词）获得蜂王地位！这款每日谜题结合了词汇挑战和发现的满足感。
zh.objectives: 使用7个蜂窝字母找出尽可能多的有效单词，始终包含中心字母。发现全字母词（使用所有字母）获得最高分。通过找到所有可能的单词争取'天才'甚至'蜂王'排名。
zh.howToPlay: 使用蜂窝字母组成4个以上字母的单词。每个单词必须包含中心字母。使用所有7个字母的单词可获得额外积分！

rules.controls: 点击或输入字母拼写单词。每个单词必须包含中心字母。按回车或点击提交检查你的单词。
mechanics: 单词必须有至少4个字母
每个单词必须包含中心字母
字母可以在单词中多次使用
全字母词使用所有7个字母（巨大奖励！）
得分排名从初学者到蜂王
features: 每日谜题 - 每个人同一谜题
进阶排名 - 从初学者到蜂王
全字母词搜寻 - 找到使用所有字母的单词
洗牌 - 重新排列外围字母获得新视角

tips: 找到使用所有字母的单词获得高分

faq.question: 什么是全字母词？
faq.answer: 全字母词是至少使用所有7个可用字母各一次的单词。找到全字母词会给你大幅加分，通常是达到更高排名的关键。

faq.question: 可以多次使用字母吗？
faq.answer: 可以！你可以在单词中多次使用任何字母。例如，如果你有'L'，你可以拼写'LEVEL'。

faq.question: 如何达到蜂王地位？
faq.answer: 蜂王需要找到谜题中所有可能的单词。这非常困难，通常需要数小时的游戏或团队合作。

faq.question: 洗牌按钮有什么用？
faq.answer: 洗牌会随机重新排列6个外围字母。这可以帮助你看到新的字母组合，摆脱找单词的困境。
